title: ampelopsis aconitifolia f. glabra
intro: Ampelopsis aconitifolia f. glabra, also known as the smooth vine, is a type of plant that belongs to the grapevine family and is native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory infections. Ampelopsis aconitifolia f. glabra can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
